parameters.content:
## 🛑 Human Approval Gate

**Purpose:** Pauses a workflow and sends an approval request via email (or Slack). Resumes only after a human clicks Approve or Reject.

**Setup:**
1. Create an SMTP credential named `SMTP Email`
2. Set `NOTIFICATION_EMAIL_TO` environment variable
3. Ensure the n8n webhook URL is accessible from the approver's email client

**Input:**
```json
{
  "title": "Approve: Weekly Feedback Report",
  "summary": "3 critical insights, 12 feature requests...",
  "details": {},
  "approver_email": "pm@yourcompany.com",
  "timeout_hours": 24
}
```

**Output:**
```json
{
  "decision": "approved",
  "decided_at": "2025-01-01T10:00:00Z",
  "comment": ""
}
```

⚠️ The workflow pauses here until the approver responds or the timeout expires.

parameters.subject: Action required: {{ $json.title }}
parameters.message:
{{ $json.title }}

{{ $json.summary }}

Details: 
{{ JSON.stringify($json.details, null, 2) }}

This request expires at: {{ $json.expiresAt }}

✅ Approve ❌ Reject

Sent by n8n Product & Founder Automation OS

meta.description: Shared subworkflow: pauses execution and sends an approval email. Resumes when the approver clicks Approve or Reject, or after timeout.
